rationale: Est. Code §309.056 governs estate inventory affidavit procedures and has no relation to Tax Code §11.13(b) residence homestead exemption amounts. No overlap or conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 309.056. AFFIDAVIT IN LIEU OF INVENTORY, APPRAISEMENT, AND LIST OF CLAIMS.
_note: Rule text concerns estate administration procedure; proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemption. No intersection.
